heading: RESIDENCE HOMESTEAD OF 100 PERCENT OR TOTALLY DISABLED VETERAN
operative_text: A disabled veteran who has been awarded by the United States Department of Veterans Affairs or its successor 100 percent disability compensation due to a service-connected disability and a rating of 100 percent disabled or of individual unemployability is entitled to an exemption from taxation of the total appraised value of the veteran's residence homestead.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: has the meaning assigned by Section 11.22.
has the meaning assigned by Section 11.13.
means the individual who was married to a disabled veteran at the time of the veteran's death.

_note: Full statute text provided. Operative text captures core exemption in Subsection (b); Subsections (c) and (d) extend exemption to surviving spouses and portability provisions respectively.
